SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbolFile, CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbolFunction, CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbolSection
Enclosing class:
CoffSymbolTable
public class CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol extends Object implements Comparable<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>
A COFF symbol table entry. Base class for symbol types including file, section, and function symbols.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final short
    IMAGE_SYM_ABSOLUTE
    Section number used for absolute symbols.
    static final short
    IMAGE_SYM_DEBUG
    Section number used for debug symbols.
    static final short
    IMAGE_SYM_UNDEFINED
    Section number used for undefined symbols.

    Description

    Creates a COFF symbol from parsed record fields.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffSymbol

      public CoffSymbol(String name, int value, short sectionNumber, short type, CoffStorageClass storageClass)
      Creates a COFF symbol.
      Parameters:
      name - symbol name
      value - symbol value
      sectionNumber - symbol section number
      type - symbol type
      storageClass - symbol storage class

    • CoffSymbol

      public CoffSymbol(String name, int value, short sectionNumber, short type, CoffStorageClass storageClass, byte numberOfAuxSymbols, DataInput dataInput) throws IOException
      Creates a COFF symbol from parsed record fields.
      Parameters:
      name - symbol name
      value - symbol value
      sectionNumber - symbol section number
      type - symbol type
      storageClass - symbol storage class
      numberOfAuxSymbols - number of auxiliary records
      dataInput - input stream positioned after the symbol header
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the symbol name.
      Returns:
      symbol name

    • getValue

      public int getValue()
      Returns the symbol value (typically an address or offset).
      Returns:
      symbol value

    • getSectionNumber

      public short getSectionNumber()
      Returns the section number this symbol is defined in. Special values include IMAGE_SYM_UNDEFINED (0), IMAGE_SYM_ABSOLUTE (-1), and IMAGE_SYM_DEBUG (-2).
      Returns:
      section number

    • getType

      public short getType()
      Returns the symbol type information.
      Returns:
      symbol type

    • getStorageClass

      public CoffStorageClass getStorageClass()
      Returns the storage class of this symbol.
      Returns:
      storage class

    • getNumberOfAuxSymbols

      public byte getNumberOfAuxSymbols()
      Returns the number of auxiliary symbol records following this symbol.
      Returns:
      number of auxiliary symbol records

    • writeAuxiliarySymbolRecord

      protected void writeAuxiliarySymbolRecord(DataOutput dataOutput) throws IOException
      Writes auxiliary symbol records for this symbol.
      Parameters:
      dataOutput - output stream to write to
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol o)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol>
